name: Jayce

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Hextech Capacitor
passive.description_source: Innate: Whenever  Jayce switches between  Hammer Stance and  Cannon Stance, he briefly gains  bonus movement speed and  ignores unit collision.

effects.description: Innate: Whenever Jayce switches between either Hammer Stance or Cannon Stance, he gains ghosting and 40 bonus movement speed for 0.75 seconds.

passive.description: Innate: Whenever Jayce switches between either Hammer Stance or Cannon Stance, he gains ghosting and 40 bonus movement speed for 0.75 seconds.

basic_ability_1.name: To the Skies!
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Jayce leaps to the target enemy's location and smashes his hammer to the ground, dealing physical damage and  slowing nearby enemies.

effects.context_notes: Active: Jayce leaps to the target enemy's location over 0.5 seconds. Upon arrival, he smashes his hammer to the ground to deal physical damage to all enemies within an area and slow them for 2 seconds.

Active: Jayce leaps to the target enemy's location over 0.5 seconds. Upon arrival, he smashes his hammer to the ground to deal physical damage to all enemies within an area and slow them for 2 seconds.

effects.description: To the Skies! deals 10 bonus physical damage to monsters.
Lightning Field can be cast during the dash.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Jayce leaps to the target enemy's location over 0.5 seconds. Upon arrival, he smashes his hammer to the ground to deal physical damage to all enemies within an area and slow them for 2 seconds.

basic_ability_2.name: Lightning Field
basic_ability_2.description_source: Passive:  Jayce's  basic attacks restore  mana  on-hit.

effects.context_notes: Passive: Jayce's basic attacks restore mana on-hit.
Active: Jayce surrounds himself with an electric field for 4 seconds that deals magic damage every second to nearby enemies.
Active: Jayce surrounds himself with an electric field for 4 seconds that deals magic damage every second to nearby enemies.

basic_ability_2.description: Passive: Jayce's basic attacks restore mana on-hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The mana restore triggers on structures.

basic_ability_3.name: Thundering Blow
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Jayce swings his hammer at the target enemy, briefly  rooting them and dealing magic damage based on the target's maximum health, then  knocks them back.

effects.context_notes: Active: Jayce roots the target enemy over the cast time, then swings his hammer at them to deal magic damage, capped against monsters, and knock them back 600 units.
Active: Jayce roots the target enemy over the cast time, then swings his hammer at them to deal magic damage, capped against monsters, and knock them back 600 units.

effects.description: Jayce is unable to cast To the Skies! or Shock Blast for 0.4 seconds after Thundering Blow's cast time.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Jayce roots the target enemy over the cast time, then swings his hammer at them to deal magic damage, capped against monsters, and knock them back 600 units.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): If the target becomes untargetable, dies, or is too far away or no longer in sight during the cast time, this ability will cancel but does not go on cooldown nor pay its cost (if applicable).

ultimate.name: Transform Mercury Cannon
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Jayce transforms into  Cannon Stance, becoming  ranged with greater  attack range and gaining new  abilities.

effects.description: Active: Jayce transforms into Cannon Stance, receiving access to its abilities, becoming ranged with 500 attack range, and empowering his next basic attack to reduce the target's armor and magic resistance by 20% / 25% / 30% / 35% (based on level) for 5 seconds.
Jayce begins the game with Transform but cannot increase its rank. Instead, his basic abilities each have 6 ranks.

ultimate.description: Active: Jayce transforms into Cannon Stance, receiving access to its abilities, becoming ranged with 500 attack range, and empowering his next basic attack to reduce the target's armor and magic resistance by 20% / 25% / 30% / 35% (based on level) for 5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Transformations do not count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as Spellblade and triggering Force Pulse's passive.
Manual review (2026-02-25): Transform Mercury Cannon resolves immediate stance-swap self-state on cast, while the resistance-shred payload resolves on the next empowered basic-attack hit.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

sources.type: League of Legends Wiki (ability data template)
sources.used_for: manual behavior verification for Transform Mercury Cannon cast-state timing and empowered-next-hit resistance-shred resolution semantics

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
